tuning: E A D G B E
content:

Date: Sat, 14 Oct 1995 22:04:34 -0400 (EDT)
From: Douglas French <dfrench@site.gmu.edu>


Title:  You Gotta Be
Artist: Des'ree
Album:  I Ain't Movin'
Transcription: dfrench@site.gmu.edu

Timing: 4/4

The second chord in each line is on the 2nd eight note
of the second beat.
Lyrics or chords in question are included in [brackets].
As usual, any clarifications are appreciated.
